plg.cs.cta.p: If you plan to develop a plugin, the packaging guide is available at /contribute. To coordinate early publications, contact the team by email or Discord.
plg.cs.lead: The public plugin catalog will be published alongside the first stable release of dashAI. This page will then list verified community packages, including their component type, authorship and compatibility with the current version.
plg.cs.m2.v: Entry points · PyPI · installation from UI
plg.lead: Plugins are Python packages published on PyPI that register new components. They install with one click from the UI — no restart, no external shell.
plg.s.f: // These names are illustrative. Want to be the one who publishes the first? How to publish a plugin →
plg.s.v1: ARIMA, Prophet, NeuralProphet models under BaseModel.
plg.s.v2: Fairness metrics (Demographic Parity, Equalized Odds) under BaseMetric.
plg.s.v3: Optimized TreeSHAP, KernelSHAP variants under BaseLocalExplainer.
